analysis_summary: This video appears to be a patient education video about preparing for laparoscopic surgery, not an FLS performance video. The content shows pre-operative instructions including fasting guidelines, removing jewelry, arrival procedures, and waiting areas at what appears to be Boston Children's Hospital.
confidence_rationale: Clear educational content with title screens, patient preparation instructions, and hospital footage. No FLS trainer, instruments, or task performance visible.
cannot_score_reason: Video contains educational content about surgery preparation, not FLS task performance
